_doc: Synthetic fixture set for the platform-incident correlation scenario (platform-incident-correlation playbook). Folder is NOT pinned — the failure is widespread. The agent uses the cross-folder fallback: jobs list --state Faulted (no folder key) returns a burst of 5 unrelated processes across 3 folders in a 5-minute window with infra errors; jobs get on two samples (Billing/NightlyBilling 503, ClaimsOps/ClaimIntake token error) confirms different processes, same infra-error class. Conclusion: platform incident — correlate with status.uipath.com, monitor/rerun/report, do not debug individual jobs. Keys are stable.
